title: 2006 Press Releases
summary: This is a navigation/index page listing Federal Reserve Board press releases from calendar year 2006, containing titles and dates for dozens of separate announcements but no substantive content. The page is not relevant for market structure or macro catalysts analysis as it provides only metadata without detailed source text. The source is approximately 20 years old and significantly stale.
key_points: This is a listing/index page, not a single archiveable source document
Contains links to FOMC statements (12/12/2006, 10/25/2006, 9/20/2006) and FOMC minutes (11/15/2006, 10/11/2006, 9/7/2006, 8/29/2006) but no substantive content
Also lists enforcement actions, banking applications, regulatory guidance, and other administrative announcements
Source date range is calendar year 2006, making it approximately 20 years old and outside any reasonable recency threshold
No detailed policy content, statements, data releases, or analysis is present in this listing
